name: GOLFZON Range by Leadbetter
address: 260 Bergen Turnpike Unit I, Little Ferry, NJ 07643
about: GOLFZON Range by Leadbetter is a new concept in indoor golf training operating in Little Ferry, NJ and Westbury, NY. The venue blends proprietary GOLFZON GDR+ simulator technology with world-renowned instruction from the David Leadbetter academy, offering a comprehensive environment for learning and improvement. Players can access a wide range of services from self-practice and private lessons to group clinics and competitive virtual play, with facilities designed to welcome both new golfers and those looking to refine their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GOLFZON GDR+ simulators with ball tracking and detailed metrics for effective practice
250+ virtual golf courses for immersive play and real-time tournament competition
Leadbetter-certified instructors providing personalized improvement plans and swing analysis
State-of-the-art features like sloping lies and a PuttView interactive putting green for realistic training

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service is available.
No mention of a bar or alcohol service is available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator technology with ball tracking, sloping lies, and various hitting surfaces
Newer model with high-end camera technology and advanced features, located in Westbury
Fully immersive simulator with moving lies, five hitting surfaces, and guided putting, located in Little Ferry

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary use of equipment is provided for all sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of outside food or drink policies. BYOB is not indicated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility allows players to play faster in any weather, day or night, suggesting 18 holes can be completed efficiently, though specific time is not provided.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers Nike Junior Camps, junior instruction programs, and many junior programs and events are available.
